# Stage 7 — Atlas assembly

```{r stage-07-setup, include=FALSE}
source(file.path("..", "R", "00_atlas_setup.R"))
atlas_env <- require.atlas.checkpoint(6)
```

```{r stage-07}
atlas_env <- run_stage_07_atlas(atlas_env)
assign("atlas_env", atlas_env, envir = .GlobalEnv)
sum(atlas_env$atlas$atlas_member, na.rm = TRUE)
```
